description: You are a front-end developer setting up a browser testing environment. Configure the following experimental flags in Edge (edge://flags): Smooth Scrolling (DISABLED), Parallel downloading (ENABLED), Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents (ENABLED), Experimental QUIC protocol (ENABLED), and Tab Hover Card Images (DISABLED). Ensure the changes take effect and create a configuration document at /home/ga/Desktop/edge_flags_config.txt listing these five flags and their updated states.
